description: LTX-2.3 (distilled fp8) video-to-video occlusion / foreground removal using the Obscura Remova LoRA. Graph: axiomgraph/ComfyUIWorkflow 'LTX 2.3 Obscura_Remova'.
_WORKFLOW: cleanplate_ltx.workflow.json is the UI/graph export (source of truth). comfy_run.py converts it to API format on Spark using the image's /object_info, so you don't need a fully-loaded local ComfyUI. The first converted graph is written to ShareSync as workflow_api.json — pull it and drop it here as cleanplate_ltx.api.json (and point 'workflow' at it) to skip conversion on later runs.
_PARAMS: Node ids come from the UI graph and are preserved through conversion. Patches are applied AFTER conversion, so the paths target API format. Primitive nodes (432/302) use input name 'value' by convention; if a render fails with a 'patch target ... not in graph' note or bad inputs, pull the converted workflow_api.json and check the field names.
_TODO: Set 'image' to your built ComfyUI image (see comfy_spark/Dockerfile). That's the only required edit before a real run.
